_README: Documented, expected canboat-vs-NMEA-v1.300 divergences, suppressed from the reconcile field-level worklist. The NMEA reference is a 2009 snapshot, so most entries are deliberate canboat improvements or reconcile field-alignment artifacts. field.<PGN> maps a field Order (or "*" for the whole PGN) to the reason it is expected; pgn.<PGN> maps a PGN-level key (frame|priority|interval|fieldcount, or "*") likewise. Anything NOT listed here surfaces in reconcile.py as a candidate real discrepancy.

60416.4: canboat improvement: PDF marks the RTS frame-count byte reserved; canboat decodes it as a number

60928.10: canboat improvement: PDF reserved bit decoded as ISO self-configurable lookup

126208.*: reconcile artifact: PDF has one generic group-function entry; canboat splits PRN 126208 into 8 message variants, so field-by-order alignment is meaningless

126464.1: canboat improvement: PDF generic number is canboat's GROUP_FUNCTION lookup

126996.7: canboat improvement: Certification Level refined from number to lookup

127511.8: canboat improvement: Load Sense Interval modeled as DURATION (time) rather than an enumeration

128259.5: canboat improvement: PDF reserved bits decoded as Speed Direction

128267.4: canboat improvement: PDF reserved bits decoded as Range

128520.*: known divergence (also in legacy validate-csv ignore_prn): canboat field split/repeating-set modeling differs throughout Tracked Target Data

129038.16: canboat improvement: regional-applications reserved bits decoded as a lookup

129285.5: minor: Navigation direction modeled as 3 bits (canboat) vs 4 (PDF); absorbed by adjacent reserved

129550.7: reconcile artifact: PDF skips field #6 (numbers 5 -> 7), so PDF #7 Differential Operation Mode misaligns against canboat #7 Reserved; the fields actually match (canboat #6)

129796.*: reconcile artifact: AIS Acknowledge repeating Destination/Sequence set is modeled differently from the PDF's flat fields

129798.14: reconcile artifact: AIS regional/repeating field alignment

129808.1: canboat improvement: DSC Format Symbol refined number -> lookup
129808.2: canboat improvement: DSC Category Symbol refined number -> lookup
129808.4: canboat improvement: Nature of Distress refined number -> lookup
129808.5: canboat improvement: Subsequent Communication Mode refined number -> lookup
129808.21: canboat improvement: DSC Expansion Field Symbol refined number -> lookup

130074.5: canboat improvement: field the PDF gives an integer datatype is correctly reserved in canboat
